services.title: AC Repair & Service

services.title: Heating System Repair
services.description: Heat pump or furnace issues resolved quickly — because cold houses don't wait for business hours.

services.title: System Installation

services.title: Emergency Service
services.description: System died at midnight? We're the ones who actually show up when you need us most.

about.heading: Straight talk about HVAC in Middle Georgia
about.body: We're the team Macon calls when their heating and cooling quits working. No sales pressure, no unnecessary upsells — just honest diagnosis and quality repairs that last. Been fixing systems across Middle Georgia because when it's 95 degrees outside, you need someone who knows what they're doing.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times across the region

cta.heading: System not working right?
cta.body: Don't sweat it out or freeze — call Comfort Time and we'll get your HVAC running properly again.
